code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when None
    print("")
  when Some(line)
    let tokens = string.split_whitespace(line)
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    let n = tokens.len()
    while i < n
      match tokens.get(i)
      when None
        i = i
      when Some(tok)
        match string.parse_int(tok)
        when None
          i = i
        when Some(v)
          let rlen = list.len(result)
          if rlen == 0
            result = list.push(result, v)
          else
            match list.get(result, rlen - 1)
            when None
              result = list.push(result, v)
            when Some(last)
              if last == v
                i = i
              else
                result = list.push(result, v)
              end
            end
          end
        end
      end
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut j = 0
    let m = list.len(result)
    while j < m
      match list.get(result, j)
      when None
        j = j
      when Some(v)
        if j == 0
          out = "#{v}"
        else
          out = "#{out} #{v}"
        end
      end
      j = j + 1
    end
    print(out)
  end
end
